deploymentAttempt.workflow: Deploy Owner Portal Hard Rule Production
deploymentAttempt.exactBlocker: No encrypted clasp credential was configured in GitHub Actions secrets and no authenticated clasp session was available in the execution environment.

singleRemainingDeploymentDependency.name: Authenticated clasp credential
singleRemainingDeploymentDependency.alternativeExecution: Run scripts/deploy-owner-portal-next-production.sh from the previously authenticated Google Cloud Shell session with the existing project, deployment, and spreadsheet IDs.
singleRemainingDeploymentDependency.resumeAction: Rerun failed workflow run 29208826609 or dispatch Deploy Owner Portal Hard Rule Production after the credential is available.

postDeploymentAcceptance: Run the non-destructive Owner Portal self-test
Verify Today, Needs Rick's Decision, Active Work, Money, Growth, Website, and System Health
Verify Unified Tasks list, board, and calendar modes
Record screenshots, deployment evidence, backup digest, and rollback reference
prohibitedClaims: Do not call the hard-rule Owner Portal source deployed until clasp push and existing-deployment update complete
Do not claim customer portal activation
Do not claim any external provider action is enabled
nextExecutableStep: Supply the encrypted clasp credential to the controlled deployment workflow or use the authenticated Cloud Shell session, then rerun the existing-deployment-only deployment.
